name: Bug Report

title: "fix: [Short Title of Bug]"
labels: bug

---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots / Video
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows, Mac]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
- App Component: [e.g. Dashboard, Sign In Page]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g. Supabase auth error codes, console logs).
